name: Surinsar Lake
description: The twin lake to Mansar, Surinsar is an incredibly peaceful, deeply serene water body completely surrounded by thickly wooded mountain ranges.
history: Legend states that the Mahabharata warrior Arjuna shot an arrow into the ground at Mansar, and it emerged at Surinsar, creating both lakes.
famousFor: Lotus blooms, bird watching, twin to Mansar Lake.
